chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2947 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.13371/2024 2. For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 None present for the petitioners Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG --------- This matter was lastly taken up on 10.12.2024, which is almost 10 months ago. In the last 10 months, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
